findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "search_restaurants" is 1848 chars, far longer than this server's median (126). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Search restaurants by natural-language intent. location: neighborhood filter (e.g. "Mission", "Marina"); empty (default) = no filter, all SF. goal: discover|boo…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "remember" references sensitive artifacts (credentials, password, cookie). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
